title: Fix admin panel navigation button not appearing after authentication

requirements.text: Debug and fix the Layout component in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx to ensure the Admin navigation button renders in the header immediately after a user authenticates with Internet Identity, identifying why the button is not appearing despite email-based authentication being implemented

quotes: No I can't it isn't poping up

acceptanceCriteria: Admin navigation button appears in the Layout header when an authenticated user logs in
Button visibility is not delayed or blocked by conditional rendering logic
Authentication state changes trigger proper re-renders of the Layout component

requirements.text: Verify the useIsOwner hook in frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts correctly handles the authentication state change from Internet Identity login and returns the admin status without causing rendering delays or false negatives for the email jj7250328@gmail.com

quotes: No I can't it isn't poping up

acceptanceCriteria: useIsOwner hook responds immediately to authentication state changes
Hook returns correct admin status for the email jj7250328@gmail.com
No loading states block the Layout component from rendering the Admin button

requirements.text: Add comprehensive frontend console logging in the Layout component to trace why the Admin button is not rendering, outputting authentication state, useIsOwner hook return values, loading states, and the exact conditional logic evaluation that determines button visibility

quotes: No I can't it isn't poping up

acceptanceCriteria: Console logs show authentication state transitions
Logs display useIsOwner hook return values and types
Logs confirm whether conditional rendering logic evaluates to show or hide the button
Logs include timestamps to identify timing issues

requirements.text: Verify the backend isCallerAdmin method correctly authenticates users with email jj7250328@gmail.com and returns true, ensuring the email-based authentication system is functioning properly

quotes: No I can't it isn't poping up

acceptanceCriteria: Backend isCallerAdmin returns true for authenticated users with email jj7250328@gmail.com
Email comparison is case-insensitive or normalized
Backend logs confirm successful email retrieval and comparison

constraints: Do not modify Internet Identity authentication hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or useInternetIdentity.tsx
Preserve existing email-based authentication logic implemented in Version 43
nonGoals: Implementing new authentication methods beyond email-based verification
Redesigning the admin panel UI or statistics display
Modifying the AdminPanel component content or layout
